hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select FA.EJECUCION_LOG_ID as "ejecucionlogId" ,FA.REGLA_NEGOCIO_ID as "reglaNegocioId" ,FA.JAVA_LOG as "javalog" ,FA.SP_LOG as "splog" ,FA.RESUMEN_LOG as "resumenlog" ,FA.CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha" FROM [SGALERTASSYS].EJECUCION_LOG FA with (nolock) where ISNULL(FA.REGLA_NEGOCIO_ID,0) = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio, ISNULL(FA.REGLA_NEGOCIO_ID,0) ) AND CAST(FA.CREACION_FECHA AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(:fechaPreparacionInicio AS DATE) AND CAST(:fechaPreparacionFin AS DATE) order by FA.EJECUCION_LOG_ID desc

select COUNT(1) FROM [SGALERTASSYS].EJECUCION_LOG FA with (nolock) where ISNULL(FA.REGLA_NEGOCIO_ID,0) = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio, ISNULL(FA.REGLA_NEGOCIO_ID,0) ) AND CAST(FA.CREACION_FECHA AS DATE) BETWEEN CAST(:fechaPreparacionInicio AS DATE) AND CAST(:fechaPreparacionFin AS DATE)
